id.description: Unique identifier of the backup this archive was created from

notification_emails.description: Email addresses that will receive notifications about the archive operation

state.description: Current state of the archive operation

create_time.description: Timestamp when the archive was created

start_time.description: Timestamp when the archive operation started

complete_time.description: Timestamp when the archive operation completed. This field is only populated when state is `completed`

abort_time.description: Timestamp when the archive operation was aborted. This field is only populated when state is `aborted`

download_uri.description: Download URL for the completed archive. This field is only populated when state is `completed`
